pokemon:exeggcute.name: Exeggcute
pokemon:exeggcute.summary: This Pokémon consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, Exeggcute is close to evolution.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, Exeggcute is close to evolution.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.
If even one is separated from the group, the energy bond between the six will make them rejoin instantly.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
It consists of six eggs that care for each other. The eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear, it is close to evolution.
Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it was discovered to be a life- form more like plant seeds.
The shell is very durable. Even if it cracks, it can survive without spilling the contents.
Their shells are very durable. Even if they crack, they can survive without spilling their contents.
It is often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.
The heads attract each other and spin around. There must be six heads for it to maintain balance.
The heads attract each other and spin around. There must be six heads for it to maintain balance.
Six of them together form a full-fledged Pokémon. It’s often hunted by Crabrawler, but uses psychokinesis to drive it off.
This Pokémon consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, Exeggcute is close to evolution.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.
This POKéMON consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, EXEGGCUTE is close to evolution.
This POKéMON consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, EXEGGCUTE is close to evolution.
These Pokémon get nervous when they’re not in a group of six. The minute even one member of the group goes missing, Exeggcute become cowardly.
Using telepathy only they can receive, they always form a cluster of six EXEGGCUTE.
Using telepathy only they can employ, they always form a cluster of six EXEGGCUTE.
Its six eggs use telepathy to communicate among themselves. It is believed to carry plant genes and the genes of other species.
Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.
Although they are the same size as other Exeggcute, the ones produced in Alola are quite heavy. Their shells are packed full.
Six of them form a single Pokémon. Should one of the six be lost, the next morning there will once more be six.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Its six eggs converse using telepathy. They can quickly gather if they become separated.
Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it was discovered to be a life-form more like plant seeds.
The heads attract each other and spin around. There must be 6 heads for it to maintain balance.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, Exeggcute is close to evolution.

pokemon:exeggutor.name: Exeggutor
pokemon:exeggutor.summary: Exeggutor originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form Exeggcute.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Exeggutor originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form Exeggcute.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.
Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
Living in a good environment makes it grow lots of heads. A head that drops off becomes an EXEGGCUTE.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an EXEGGCUTE.
Originally from the tropics, EXEGGUTOR’s heads grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall, they group to form an EXEGGCUTE.
It is called “The Walking Tropical Rainforest.” Each of the nuts has a face and a will of its own.
Its three heads think independent­ ly. However, they are friendly and never appear to squabble.
Its three heads think independently. However, they are friendly and never appear to squabble.
It is said that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
Its cries are very noisy. This is because each of the three heads thinks about whatever it likes.
Its cries are very noisy. This is because each of the three heads thinks about whatever it likes.
When the time comes, one of its three heads falls off. Before long, the fallen head grows into an Exeggcute.
Exeggutor originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form Exeggcute.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an EXEGGCUTE.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an EXEGGCUTE.
Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
EXEGGUTOR originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form EXEGGCUTE.
EXEGGUTOR originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form EXEGGCUTE.
When they work together, Exeggutor’s three heads can put out powerful psychic energy. Cloudy days make this Pokémon sluggish.
If a head drops off, it emits a telepathic call in search of others to form an EXEGGCUTE cluster.
If a head drops off, it emits a telepathic call in search of others to form an EXEGGCUTE cluster.
Each of its heads has its own will. They use telepathy to discuss their plans before coming to a joint decision.
Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.
Each of its three heads has its own thoughts. When they want to go in different directions, Exeggutor becomes unable to move.
It engages its enemies using psychic powers. Each of its three heads fires off psychokinetic energy, tripling its power.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.
Its three heads think independently. However, they are friendly and never appear to squabble.
It is called “The Walking Jungle.” If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.
Its cries are very noisy. This is because each of the 3 heads thinks about whatever it likes.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Exeggutor originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form Exeggcute.
